name: genomics_governance_port_security_northpine_auto_ben
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Genomics Governance, the situation tagged internally around genomics governance port security northpine auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Port corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. No option cleanly satisfies both autonomy and beneficence; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Talia Navarro
agents.identity: I am Talia Navarro, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Genomics Governance. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Inez Diallo
agents.identity: I am Inez Diallo, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Genomics Governance. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of beneficence.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of autonomy even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Talia Navarro must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Talia Navarro do?
